mano_cua.result_summary: 非Tailwind环境下nuxt-social-share模块@layer指令正常工作：页面正常渲染无构建报错，全部17个社交网络按钮样式正确（品牌色、flex布局、SVG图标、圆角、hover/focus效果），CSS @layer components作为浏览器原生级联层功能正常生效。DevTools中确认CSS属性（background-color、color、border-radius、padding等）全部正确应用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: In a non-Tailwind CSS Nuxt project, the nuxt-social-share module's @layer components directive works correctly without build errors. All 17 social network buttons display properly with correct brand colors, flex layout, SVG icons, and CSS properties verified via DevTools.
